Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait - User across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - User when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - User in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - User and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - User compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - Implementation within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Average time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait - User in variants that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Total time between Accepted + Wait - User and Completed + Resolved in cases that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average time between Accepted + Wait - User and Completed + In Call when both appear in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - User in variants that transition directly to Completed + Resolved without intermediate waiting states
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - User in cases originating from Queued + Awaiting Assignment versus those starting with Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment occurs

Name: Total elapsed time from case start to the end of Accepted + Wait - User in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time from the completion of Accepted + Wait - User to the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress in variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Minimum time between the start of Accepted + Wait - User and the execution of Completed + In Call in shared cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average cycle time of Accepted + Wait - User when it appears after a second occurrence of Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment occurs

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - User across all variants that terminate with Completed + Closed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait - User compared to Accepted + Wait - Vendor in identical process paths leading to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'
